articles.author: Adam Shirley
articles.title: Julie Bishop was adamant she wasn't going anywhere — until she did
articles.description: December 31 was the date when Julie Bishop was due to finish her term as Australian National University chancellor, so why — after having repeatedly stated she would see her commitment through — did she leave months earlier?
articles.content:
Julie Bishop, as so often has been her way, was resolute.
Unmoved.

articles.title: How Putin's regime is throttling the internet in Russia
